competency_question: Which accountability event is this assertion about?
planned_test: Event ID/type preserved in every positive fixture

competency_question: Which evidence assertion represents that event?
planned_test: Unique evidence ID and version validation

competency_question: When is the event declared to have occurred?
When was the evidence emitted?
What clock source, precision and declared skew apply?
Which software boundary emitted and signed the evidence?
Which operational actor or service performed the event?
required_fields_or_invariant: actor.actor_ref_token, actor.actor_type, actor.role_code, optional organisation token
planned_test: Actor absent from access/disclosure fixture rejects

competency_question: Can the verifier distinguish the operational actor from the software emitter?
Which pseudonymous person context, if any, is implicated?
required_fields_or_invariant: subject_context.status, token and token system when applicable
planned_test: Missing token for subject-scoped event rejects

competency_question: Is the assertion explicitly not subject-scoped?
What class of monitoring object is placed under evidence management?
Which token identifies the object without redistributing it?
planned_test: Raw FHIR resource/full object negative control

competency_question: What capture or summary interval does the object represent?
Is the object bound by a commitment, and under which representation profile?
Can an authorised party later test a disclosed object against the commitment?
required_fields_or_invariant: commitment metadata plus externally governed payload and nonce

competency_question: Does the public object avoid exposing the nonce used for a low-entropy payload commitment?
What access action was attempted or completed?
Which object was targeted?
required_fields_or_invariant: at least one objects[] item with object_role=target

competency_question: For what controlled purpose was access declared?
What was the declared outcome and reason?
Which policy version governed the decision?
required_fields_or_invariant: policy_binding.policy_ref_token, policy_version and optional digest/source token

competency_question: Which consent state/version was associated with the access when the scenario requires consent mediation?
Does a changed actor, role, purpose, target, policy or consent state invalidate the original core digest/receipt?
required_fields_or_invariant: canonical core digest and receipt binding

competency_question: Which consent record and version changed?
What were the previous and new consent states?
When did the new state become effective?
Which actor caused or recorded the transition?
Which policy context applies to the transition?
Is the transition permitted by the declared project state graph?
Can reactivation be represented only as a new consent version/token where required?
Which input objects were used?
required_fields_or_invariant: one or more objects[] with object_role=input

competency_question: Which output objects were produced?
required_fields_or_invariant: one or more objects[] with object_role=output

competency_question: Which transformation method and version were declared?
Which agent was responsible for the transform?
Can the transform interval or event time be determined?
Are input/output object bindings distinct or explicitly version-changing?
Does a mutation of an input, output or transform version invalidate the original binding?
Which organisation/service role disclosed the object?
Which tokenised recipient or recipient role was declared?
Which object or category was disclosed?
required_fields_or_invariant: target object binding and data-category code

competency_question: For what purpose and under which policy/consent version?
Was the disclosure permitted, denied or failed according to the source assertion?
Does the envelope avoid carrying the disclosed monitoring values?
Which input category or tokenised source set was aggregated?
What time window was aggregated?
How many samples contributed, without exposing their values?
Which aggregation method and version were used?
Which output summary object was produced?
Can an output commitment be checked later under authorised disclosure?
Does changing the window, sample count, method or output alter the bound digest?
Which minimisation and tokenisation profile governed the object?
Are raw physiological values, sample arrays and direct identifiers absent under the executable profile?
Can the unsigned core be canonicalised to the same bytes after object-key reordering?
Are timestamps normalised consistently before canonicalisation?
Are duplicate keys, non-finite numbers and unsupported number forms rejected at admission?
Which registered emitter key signed the core digest?
Does the receipt bind the computed core digest and log identity?
At what leaf index and tree size was the evidence included?
required_fields_or_invariant: signed leaf_index, tree_size; matching proof fields

competency_question: Does the inclusion path reconstruct the signed root for exactly that index and size?
required_fields_or_invariant: inline proof, root and verifier algorithm

competency_question: Is the proof material itself covered by the receipt signature directly or through a digest?
required_fields_or_invariant: inline proof and inclusion_proof_digest in signed projection

competency_question: Can a verifier with retained state detect a smaller checkpoint or a different same-size root?
required_fields_or_invariant: previous verifier state and checkpoint comparison

competency_question: Can a supplied consistency proof show that one retained checkpoint is a prefix of another under the local model?
At which curation stage did an object fail?
Which stable machine-readable code explains the rejection?
Was an evidence core or receipt created before failure?
Which method, schema, canonicalisation and receipt versions produced the result?
Can a clean extraction regenerate the deterministic reference objects and tables?
required_fields_or_invariant: run manifest, hashes and exact commands

competency_question: Can reported figures be regenerated solely from retained CSV/JSON sources?
